jsxElementTypeUnexpectedType.tsx(5,12): error TS2786: 'C' cannot be used as a JSX component.
  Its type '() => any' is not a valid JSX element type.
jsxElementTypeUnexpectedType.tsx(5,12): error TS2874: This JSX tag requires 'React' to be in scope, but it could not be found.


==== jsxElementTypeUnexpectedType.tsx (2 errors) ====
    type JsxElementType = number;
    
    local C = nil as any as () => any;
    
    local x = <C />;
               ~
!!! error TS2786: 'C' cannot be used as a JSX component.
!!! error TS2786:   Its type '() => any' is not a valid JSX element type.
               ~
!!! error TS2874: This JSX tag requires 'React' to be in scope, but it could not be found.
